name: io.github.dearlordylord/huly-mcp
title: Huly MCP
description: Huly MCP: feature-complete MCP server for Huly integration

environmentVariables.name: HULY_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds. Omit to use the package default.

environmentVariables.name: HULY_TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated native Huly tool categories to expose, such as issues,projects,search. If unset with HULY_TOOLS and TOOLSETS, all native tools are exposed.

environmentVariables.name: HULY_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated exact native Huly tool names to expose in addition to selected HULY_TOOLSETS, such as list_documents,create_issue.

environmentVariables.name: TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Deprecated alias for HULY_TOOLSETS. Ignored when HULY_TOOLSETS is set.
